CustomField.description: The specific departure Location record (Record Type: Agency) for this line item. Overrides Opportunity.Default_Agency__c for trip grouping purposes when set. Used as the first grouping dimension: line items sharing the same agency, direction, and date are consolidated into the same Trip.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Select the specific departure agency for this line item. Leave blank to use the opportunity's default agency. Only agency-type locations should be proposed.
CustomField.label: Departure Agency
